name: MemOcean × GBrain Phase 1 Ocean Search Benchmark
description: 40 Ocean vault full-text search questions extracted from work-scenario-200. Stages 1.0/1.1 gate: Hit@5 >= 90% (40q sample). Stage 1.2+: expand to 200q for final gate >= 92.9%.
note: Source: work-scenario-200.json ocean_search subset. 200-question full version to be created at Stage 1.2.
scoring: Strict: >= 2 gold keywords must appear in top-5 result content
